reason: Acceptance criteria and definition of done for verifying behavior-preserving Home migration.
Expected Riverpod/hooks architecture to check against, including AsyncNotifier state and hook-local controller usage.
Expected migration boundary: Home local state only, existing provider-based auth remains in place.
Verify state ownership remains scoped and global auth is not unintentionally migrated.
Verify hook usage is deliberate and limited to widget-local lifecycle/controller glue.
Verify lint/type checks, manual UI flow requirements, shared navigation, and no unrelated churn.
Verify Home fetch and favorite mutations still use Request and preserve WanAndroid response handling.
